revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
<templatestyles src="Glossary/styles.css" />
<dl class="glossary {{{class|}}}" {{#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}} {{#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"|}}><noinclude>{{glossary end}}
<!--Categories and interwikis go on the /doc page.-->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<templatestyles src="Glossary/styles.css" />
<dl class="glossary {{{class|}}}" {{#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}} {{#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"|}}><noinclude>{{glossary end}}
<!--Categories and interwikis go on the /doc page.-->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:

[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <templatestyles src="Glossary/styles.css" /> <dl class="glossary {{{class|}}}" {{#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}} {{#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"|}}><noinclude>{{glossary end}} <!--Categories and interwikis go on the /doc page.--> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

<templatestyles src="Glossary/styles.css" />

<!--Categories and interwikis go on the /doc page.-->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
revision.text:

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Glossary here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Glossary for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<templatestyles src="Glossary/styles.css" />
<dl class="glossary {{{class|}}}" {{#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}} {{#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"|}}><noinclude>{{glossary end}}
<!--Categories and interwikis go on the /doc page.-->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Glossary for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<templatestyles src="Glossary/styles.css" />
<dl class="glossary {{{class|}}}" {{#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}} {{#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"|}}><noinclude>{{glossary end}}

{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
